title: T-042 — UI: TEC-082 BOM Version Delete modal (type-to-confirm)
prompt: Build the type-to-confirm BOM version delete modal per §7A. Guards against deletion when active bom_snapshots reference the version. Match prototype `delete_bom_version_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:245-266. RED tests/ui/tec-082-delete-version.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-082-delete-version.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Type-to-confirm version delete modal that blocks when snapshots exist.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server-side check via GET .../snapshots-count before allowing delete. If snapshots exist, modal shows 'BLOCKED: snapshot referenced by WO X' message and disables delete.
acceptance_criteria: Given the modal opens, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:245-266, then it shows the same warning copy, type-to-confirm input, and destructive Delete button — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given snapshot count > 0, when modal opens, then Delete button is disabled and a blocking notice appears.
Given user types matching version label, when confirmed, then DELETE request is fired.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow delete when snapshots exist.
